canonical_definition: A benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for assessing disability bias in LLMs, consisting of paired neutral and disability-aware queries across six domains and nine disability types.
papers: Crisp: Cognitive Restructuring of Negative Thoughts through Multi-turn Supportive Dialogues

definitions.text: A benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for assessing disability bias in LLMs, consisting of paired neutral and disability-aware queries across six domains and nine disability types.
definitions.paper: Crisp: Cognitive Restructuring of Negative Thoughts through Multi-turn Supportive Dialogues

relationships.paper: Crisp: Cognitive Restructuring of Negative Thoughts through Multi-turn Supportive Dialogues
relationships.evidence: "we introduce AccessEval (Accessibility Evaluation), a benchmark evaluating 21 closed- and open-source LLMs across 6 real-world domains and 9 disability types using paired Neutral and Disability-Aware Queries."
